notes: v0.21.1 — LANCE module catalog + tuning hooks. 51 new LANCE modules across all 6 slots (10 CORE / 10 WEAPON / 8 SHIELD / 7 ENGINE / 8 WINGS / 8 FRAME), default loadout granted to every account. 4 new stat keys plug into the OVERCHARGE math: lance_charge_time_mult, lance_full_charge_dmg_bonus, lance_beam_pierce_bonus, lance_beam_range_mult. Legendary picks (STARLIGHT CORE, SUPERNOVA BARREL, METEOR FINS, VOID FRAME) each push LANCE into a distinct build identity. CLASS description rewritten to match the OVERCHARGE mechanic; onboarding label updated (SHARD / BASTION / LANCE unlocked at LV 0, CHORUS still coming soon).
